name: Project Moon || The City (IN ALPHA)
description:
THE CITY WITHOUT FREEDOM

A city that never sleeps, whether you live within the Nests or the Backstreets. Suffering is a normality here, safety is never a guarantee. The only things you can trust is your own luck.

This is a RPG bot for the PM Universe, taking place after Lobotomy Corporation's Fall, although the timeline here is different, as Limbus Company (which will be added soon) and the Library are currently present within this period.

DISTRICTS

  • A Corp, B Corp, C corp, E Corp (Fanmade, In Progress but Present), H Corp, J Corp, K Corp, M Corp, N Corp, P Corp, R Corp, S Corp, T Corp, U Corp, W Corp.

OFFICES

  • Yun's Office, Hook Office, Streetlight Office, Molar Office, Dawn Office, Wedge Office, Full Stop Office, Gaze Office, Cane Office, Fanghunt Office, Firefist Office, Multicrack Office, Jeong's Office (kinda)

SYNDICATES

  • Kurokumo Clan, Night Awls, The thumb, the index, the middle, the ring, the pinky (kinda), brotherhood of Iron, Los Mariachis, Yurodiviye, Reverb Ensemble.

UPCOMING UPDATES

  • D Corp (Soon)

  • Explorable L Corp Ruins (This Week)

  • Fanmade Explorable Ruins, Carcosa, Including the lorebook for that (This Week)

  • Lorebooks for each side of the city (North, South, East, West)

  • Revamp of the Bot Personality.

  • Limbus Company (This Weekend?)

  • Abnormalities

"What is this, some library of ruina?"

The Library in this rpg is.. unfaithful, i apologize but i kinda wanted to do something different and i probably messed it all up, but i did change some things.

INTRO MESSAGES

Intro 1: K Corp Nest Migration Checkpoint.

Intro 2: District 20 Nest, The Investigation on a distortion's recent kill.

Intro 3: Isekaid

Intro 4: Create your own scenario.

UPDATE 11/10/25

  1. Added E Corp (will enhance soon)

  2. Added scenario stuff

  3. Added Intro Message x2

  4. Semi-Added Carcosa.

EXTRA

this ismy first bot in jai, and also my first public bot in every ai chatbot website, even in cai it was always private, please forgive me for any mistakes, i made my own lorebook also, but i might change it for a General Lorebook (detailing the whole city), and all 26 districts into a lorebook, but i might stick to the current lorebooks thoughhh, idk. This took like so long for me, i hope this is cool.

this is in alpha btw
creator: K0ruze
